title: Semantic Search with Transformer-based Scientific Retrieval
abstract: This paper studies semantic search using a transformer encoder and a lightweight retrieval database. We compare title matching, abstract matching, and semantic ranking for paper discovery.
full_text: This paper studies semantic search using a transformer encoder and a lightweight retrieval database. We compare title matching, abstract matching, and semantic ranking for paper discovery. The database stores papers in SQLite for fast search and lookup.
